infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Snippd uses your camera to scan receipts, identify food items in your pantry, and record Creator Studio savings videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Snippd accesses your photo library so you can upload receipts and update your profile photo.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Snippd saves your savings receipt cards to your photo library so you can share them.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Snippd uses your location to show grocery deals at stores near you and calculate the optimal shopping route.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Snippd uses your microphone to record Creator Studio savings videos.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Snippd uses Face ID to securely unlock your account.

plugins.cameraPermission: Snippd uses your camera to scan receipts, identify food items, and record savings videos.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Snippd uses your location to find deals at stores near you.

plugins.photosPermission: Snippd accesses your photos to upload receipts.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Snippd saves your savings cards to your photo library.
